title: My Children's Grandchildren Will Say She Changed Everything
subtitle: An affirmation for becoming the turning point in your family's money story
excerpt: A short affirmation for Day 13 of the money arc. It holds the idea of being a turning point across generations, not as a burden, but as something already in motion.
sourceNotes: Day 13 theme from MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

content.text: An affirmation for Day 13. It reaches forward across generations, not as pressure, but as a way of holding the scale of what you are choosing to be the start of.
The affirmation names you as a turning point, not someone who has arrived, but someone at the start of a very long line.
I allow a new wealthy lineage to begin through me, one built on ease, wisdom, and overflow. My children's grandchildren will say she changed everything.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart. Let the second sentence land for a moment before moving on.
(Rebecca J Page, 2025). The lineage affirmation is adapted from the Day 13 journal prompt and reframe lines.
